item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.7 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * feat: add quit apps plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/67 * feat: add app hotkey plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/65 * fix: replace visibility switch with checkbox in drag preview by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/69 * chore: add GitHub Actions workflow for Homebrew Cask updates by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/71 * feat: update name and description for hide dock plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/73 * fix: update plugin id from "app-launcher" to "app-hotkey" by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/72 * refactor: auto hide dock plugin update file name and plugin id by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/75 * feat: add auto hide menu bar plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/74 * feat(quit-apps): support closing the window on esc by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/76 * feat: add zsh configuration plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/78 * fix(middle-click-plugin): add wake observer to handle system wake events by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/79 * feat: add display sleep plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/82 * feat: add system mute plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/81
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.5...v1.0.7
